title: NE1 4LP, Veolia Energy & Utility Services UK Plc: environmental permit issued - EPR/NP3935LC/V004
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit for:   Operator name: Veolia Energy & Utility Services UK Plc Installation name: Royal Victoria Infirmary Energy Centre Permit number: EPR/NP3935LC/V004  "
